name: Qatar General Insurance & Reinsurance Company Q.P.S.C.
summary: Qatar General Insurance & Reinsurance Company QPSC, together with its subsidiaries, provides general insurance and reinsurance products for individuals, families, and businesses. The company offers personal insurance products, such as motor, villa/home owner, accident, medical, jewelry, and travel insurance products. It also provides corporate insurance products comprising energy, motor, engineering, casualty, property, medical and life, and marine; and specialized insurance products for restaurants, education institutes, supermarkets, pharmacies, beauty salons, and car show rooms, as well as office, jewelry, and Islamic Takaful insurance products. In addition, the company is involved in the investment, development, and management of real estate properties; repair of automobiles; water bottling and beverage trading; hospitality, exhibition, and events management; and contracting and construction activities, as well as manufacture of rebars and insulation materials. Qatar General Insurance & Reinsurance Company QPSC was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Doha, Qatar.
